title: Grilled Mustardy Korean Shrimp Gui
description: A pescatarian-friendly Korean dish featuring grilled shrimp, mustardy flavors, and tender fregola, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fregola according to package instructions until tender.
Drain the fregola and set aside to cool.
In a large bowl, whisk together chili flakes, mustard, soy sauce, brown sugar, and minced garlic to make the marinade.
Add the shrimp to the marinade and toss to coat, letting it marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat and cook the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Brush the cooked shrimp with sesame oil and sprinkle with green onions.
Serve the grilled shrimp over the cooked fregola and enjoy.
Optional: garnish with additional green onions and serve with a side of kimchi for extra flavor.
